title: 10 best herbal teas for premenstrual syndrome
intro_desc: Herbal teas for premenstrual syndrome are natural remedies that help alleviate symptoms associated with this condition, which can include mood swings, bloating, and fatigue. These teas, specifically Vitex agnus-castus, Passiflora incarnata, Zingiber officinale, Hypericum perforatum, Ginkgo biloba, Paeonia lactiflora, Cimicifuga racemosa, Lavandula angustifolia, Valeriana officinalis, and Angelica archangelica, work to regulate hormonal imbalances and reduce stress. Without proper treatment, premenstrual syndrome can severely impact daily life, causing emotional distress, relationship strain, and reduced productivity.
